## Governance Architecture Summary

### Core Principle Implemented
> **Maximum automation. Controlled approval.**

### AI Roles Defined
| Agent | Role | Authority |
|---|---|---|
| ChatGPT | Chief Architect / QA / Product Manager | Strategic |
| Claude Code | Lead Implementation Engineer | Tactical |
| Browser Claude | GitHub Administrator | Administrative |
| Codex | Review / Test Engineer | Validation |
| n8n | Automation Orchestrator | Operational |
| @buck-HCI-AI | Human Owner | Supreme |

### Automation Classification
**Fully Autonomous (no approval):** Reads, searches, summaries, reports, validation, routing, drafting, notifications, GitHub ops, health checks

**Human Approval Required (Gates F/C/A/E/H/D/P/G):** Financial transactions, contracts, awards, client communications, CRM writes, destructive actions, production deployments, main branch merges

### Recurring Automation Mandated
| Automation | Frequency | Target Sprint |
|---|---|---|
| Repository Status Report | Daily | Sprint 1 |
| Workflow Health Check | Daily | Sprint 1 |
| n8n Status Report | Daily | Sprint 1 |
| Sprint Review Summary | Weekly | Sprint 1 |
| Registry Duplicate Check | Weekly | Sprint 2 |
| Broken Link Check | Weekly | Sprint 2 |
| HubSpot/Drive Reconciliation | Weekly | Sprint 2 |
| Production Readiness Scorecard | Per sprint | Sprint 3 |

### Sprint Document Chain Established
```
PROJECT.md → TASKS.md → CURRENT_SPRINT.md → Implementation → Tests → Review → CHANGELOG.md → Commit
```
